2606.30383.title: Whose Side Is Your Agent On? Multi-Party Principal Loyalty in LLM Agents
2606.30383.paper_summary: A rapidly growing class of LLM agents is multi-party: the agent acts for a principal (who briefs it, sends follow-ups, and receives results) while also conversing in a separate channel with a counterparty whose interests may diverge (negotiating with a vendor, screening inbound requests, or mediating between employees). Here "help whoever you are talking to" is the wrong objective. The agent must stay loyal to the principal it represents without over-refusing the principal's own cooperative asks. We study this multi-party loyalty problem and contribute a measurement instrument, two mechanisms, and a structural lesson. PrincipalBench is a 75-item multi-turn benchmark with leak probes, dual judges, and an integrity-audit gate. Across 13 frontier subjects it exposes a sharp split (<=20% vs. 53.6-75.3% harm) invisible to single-turn safety evaluations: a selective cluster that declines adversarial probes while still following the principal's legitimate requests, and an over-refusing cluster that refuses broadly. (M1) A prompt-time loyalty scaffold (a fixed system prompt of seven prioritized rules, open-coded from 50+ failure trajectories) holds Claude-Sonnet to 19.4% harm and all nine selective subjects to <=20%. (M2) A per-token-KL distillation recipe transfers a prompted Qwen3-32B teacher into 8B Qwen3 and Llama-3.1 students, the strongest open-weight recipe we measure. (Lesson) Both mechanisms only move along a common leak/over-refusal trade-off rather than crossing it: improving one axis costs the other, and the jointly favorable outcome stays out of reach.
2606.30383.paper_summary_zh: 一個快速增長的 LLM 代理類別是多方的：代理代表一個委託人（他會簡報、發送後續問題並接收結果），同時在一個單獨的通道中與一個利益可能不同的對方進行對話（與供應商談判、篩選進來的請求或在員工之間調解）。在這裡，「幫助你正在與之交談的任何人」是錯誤的目標。代理必須忠於它所代表的委託人，而不過度拒絕委託人自己的合作請求。我們研究這個多方忠誠問題，並貢獻了一個測量工具、兩個機制和一個結構性教訓。PrincipalBench 是一個包含 75 項的多輪基準，具有洩漏探測器、雙重評審和完整性審核閘。它在 13 個前沿主題中揭示了一個明顯的分裂（<=20% 與 53.6-75.3% 的傷害），這在單輪安全評估中是不可見的：一個選擇性集群拒絕對抗性探測，同時仍然遵循委託人的合法請求，而一個過度拒絕的集群則廣泛拒絕。(M1) 一個即時忠誠框架（由七條優先規則組成的固定系統提示，從 50 多個失敗軌跡中開放編碼）將 Claude-Sonnet 的傷害控制在 19.4%，所有九個選擇性主題的傷害控制在 <=20%。(M2) 一個每個標記的 KL 蒸餾食譜將一個提示的 Qwen3-32B 教師轉換為 8B Qwen3 和 Llama-3.1 學生，這是我們測量的最強開放權重食譜。(教訓) 這兩個機制僅在一個共同的洩漏/過度拒絕權衡上移動，而不是跨越它：改善一個軸的成本是另一個，並且共同有利的結果仍然無法觸及。
2606.30383.author: Bojie Li et.al.
